mapper.select: SELECT A.일정ID AS scheduleId, A.구직번호 AS participantJobNo, A.상담사ID AS counselorId, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), A.일정날짜, 23) AS scheduleDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), A.시작시간, 108) AS startTime, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), A.종료시간, 108) AS endTime, A.일정유형 AS scheduleType, A.메모 AS memo, A.알림분 AS alertMinutes, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), A.등록일, 20) AS regDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), A.수정일, 20) AS modDate, A.삭제여부 AS deleteYn, B.참여자 AS participantName, B.진행단계 AS participantStage FROM J_참여자관리_상담일정 A LEFT JOIN J_참여자관리 B ON A.구직번호 = B.구직번호 WHERE A.삭제여부 = 'N' AND A.상담사ID = #{counselorId} AND A.일정날짜 >= #{searchStartDate} AND A.일정날짜 <= #{searchEndDate} ORDER BY A.일정날짜, A.시작시간

SELECT A.일정ID AS scheduleId, A.구직번호 AS participantJobNo, A.상담사ID AS counselorId, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), A.일정날짜, 23) AS scheduleDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), A.시작시간, 108) AS startTime, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), A.종료시간, 108) AS endTime, A.일정유형 AS scheduleType, A.메모 AS memo, A.알림분 AS alertMinutes, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), A.등록일, 20) AS regDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), A.수정일, 20) AS modDate, A.삭제여부 AS deleteYn, B.참여자 AS participantName, B.진행단계 AS participantStage FROM J_참여자관리_상담일정 A LEFT JOIN J_참여자관리 B ON A.구직번호 = B.구직번호 WHERE A.일정ID = #{scheduleId} AND A.삭제여부 = 'N'
mapper.insert:
SELECT CAST(SCOPE_IDENTITY() AS INT)
INSERT INTO J_참여자관리_상담일정 ( 구직번호, 상담사ID, 일정날짜, 시작시간, 종료시간, 일정유형, 메모, 알림분, 등록일, 삭제여부 ) VALUES ( #{participantJobNo}, #{counselorId}, CAST(#{scheduleDate} AS DATE), CAST(#{startTime} AS TIME), CAST(#{endTime} AS TIME), #{scheduleType}, #{memo}, #{alertMinutes}, GETDATE(), 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE J_참여자관리_상담일정 SET 구직번호 = #{participantJobNo}, 일정날짜 = CAST(#{scheduleDate} AS DATE), 시작시간 = CAST(#{startTime} AS TIME), 종료시간 = CAST(#{endTime} AS TIME), 일정유형 = #{scheduleType}, 메모 = #{memo}, 알림분 = #{alertMinutes}, 수정일 = GETDATE() WHERE 일정ID = #{scheduleId} AND 삭제여부 = 'N'
UPDATE J_참여자관리_상담일정 SET 삭제여부 = 'Y', 수정일 = GETDATE() WHERE 일정ID = #{scheduleId}
UPDATE J_참여자관리_상담일정 SET 일정날짜 = CAST(#{newDate} AS DATE), 시작시간 = CAST(#{newStartTime} AS TIME), 종료시간 = CAST(#{newEndTime} AS TIME), 수정일 = GETDATE() WHERE 일정ID = #{scheduleId} AND 삭제여부 = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT TOP 10 구직번호 AS participantJobNo, 참여자 AS participantName, 진행단계 AS participantStage FROM J_참여자관리 WHERE 전담자_계정 = #{counselorId} AND 마감 = 0 AND (참여자 LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR CAST(구직번호 AS VARCHAR) LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%') ORDER BY 구직번호 DESC

SELECT A.일정ID AS scheduleId, A.구직번호 AS participantJobNo, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), A.시작시간, 108) AS startTime, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), A.종료시간, 108) AS endTime, A.일정유형 AS scheduleType, A.메모 AS memo, B.참여자 AS participantName FROM J_참여자관리_상담일정 A LEFT JOIN J_참여자관리 B ON A.구직번호 = B.구직번호 WHERE A.삭제여부 = 'N' AND A.상담사ID = #{counselorId} AND A.일정날짜 = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE(), 23) ORDER BY A.시작시간

SELECT A.일정ID AS scheduleId, A.상담사ID AS counselorId, A.구직번호 AS participantJobNo, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), A.일정날짜, 23) AS scheduleDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), A.시작시간, 108) AS startTime, A.일정유형 AS scheduleType, A.메모 AS memo, A.알림분 AS alertMinutes, B.참여자 AS participantName FROM J_참여자관리_상담일정 A LEFT JOIN J_참여자관리 B ON A.구직번호 = B.구직번호 WHERE A.삭제여부 = 'N' AND A.알림분 IS NOT NULL AND A.알림분 > 0 AND A.일정날짜 = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE(), 23) AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), DATEADD(MINUTE, -A.알림분, A.시작시간), 108) = CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), GETDATE(), 108)
SELECT 아이디 AS counselorId, 이름 AS counselorName FROM J_참여자관리_로그인정보 WHERE 지점 = #{branch} AND (아이디사용여부 NOT IN ('퇴사','정지','잠금') OR 아이디사용여부 IS NULL OR 아이디사용여부 = '') ORDER BY 조회순서 ASC
